data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time usage display.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the real-time usage display feature, specifically confirming that the system provides feedback on hours used. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but without direct evidence of the system's implementation, the requirement cannot be conclusively validated.
gaps: No evidence of real-time usage display functionality.
